summary:
The AnswerAI team held their regular sync covering several major topics. Brad shared extensive work he'd done on updating the AnswerAI SaaS subscription agreement, including new IP ownership exhibits, order form updates with usage-based credits, professional services provisions, and SLA language. The team debated SLA wording around bug fixes and support response times, with Adam pushing for more specificity and Brad arguing the current 'commercially reasonable timeframe as determined by AnswerAI' language was more protective.

A significant discussion centered on IAS deployment challenges - the client wants oversight of production pushes but won't assign resources to review them. The team discussed implementing automated tests (Playwright/API tests) for critical workflows and a 3-5 business day review window with auto-deploy. Brad also shared that Fiddler was impressed with Max's integration dashboard and wants to discuss partnership opportunities. The construction company contract meeting was moved to Monday with strong signals toward signing.

Technical items included a chatbot embed bug where local storage sync breaks across multiple browser tabs (affecting thumbs up/down functionality), the need to recreate the FlowWise document store so it's not owned by Bisma, and Brad's PR for the AnswerAgent discovery analysis. The team discussed using Claude Code/sub-agents for automating Sanity extension localization updates (18+ items) as an upcoming use case.
keyDiscussionPoints: Updated AnswerAI SaaS contract with IP ownership exhibit separating platform IP from customer data/configurations
SLA language debate - commercially reasonable timeframe vs specific response/fix commitments
IAS production deployment blockers - trust issues, no assigned reviewer, proposed automated testing solution
Fiddler partnership opportunity after they saw Max's integration dashboard
Construction company contract nearing signature - meeting moved to Monday
Chatbot embed local storage sync bug across multiple browser tabs
FlowWise document store ownership transfer from Bisma to team-controlled account
Potential use of Claude Code sub-agents for Sanity extension localization automation
Diego's banking setup delays - Max covering payments temporarily
Company structure discussion - whether to combine AnswerAI and Last Rev entities
decisions: Continue operating AnswerAI and Last Rev as separate companies for now
Max will continue invoicing through Last Rev until construction contract is signed
Will implement automated API tests for IAS critical workflows before production pushes
Propose 3-5 business day review window with auto-deploy for IAS releases
Brad will clean up Linear roadmap and create project for developer workflow tooling
Will not rewrite chatbot embed for the tab sync edge case at this time

actionItems.action: Finalize construction company contract at Monday meeting
Create automated API tests for IAS critical workflows
Set up monitoring/tests similar to former Datadog setup
Recreate FlowWise document store under team-controlled account
Get API endpoints for Netlify webhook integration
Test document store upsert config for incremental vs full reset

followUp: Camelo response on fix for capital M search issue
Construction contract red lines and final signing
IAS deployment process proposal response from Akash/Nicole/Susan
Diego bank account setup for direct invoicing to AnswerAgent
